rulings.Case Title: RAMESH SHRESTHA VS. HOTEL SUNRISE, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Motion To Consolidate Cases Cgc-16-553387 (Shrestha) And Cgc-18-566014 (Amporias) And Request For Continuance
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 18, 2018 line 6. Defendants HOTEL SUNRISE, INC., HOTEL SUNRISE, LLC, KIRITKUMAR PATEL, SHAKUNTLA PATEL, KETAN PATEL's Motion To Consolidate Cases CGC-16-553387 And CGC-18-566014 And Request For Continuance GRANTED. Actions are consolidated for all purposes. Trial is continued to February 11, 2019. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY JAYSON VS. WAH CHACK LAU BYPASS TRUST, A TRUST. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Conduct Discovery Into Defendants' Financial Condition Under Civil Code 3295
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 18, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF GREGORY JAYSON's Motion For Leave To Conduct Discovery Into Defendants' Financial Condition Under Civil Code 3295 OFF CALENDAR, Stipulation for Judgment on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN BARRY ET AL VS. 1635 10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 18, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT 1635 10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES LLC, and ELBA BORGEN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that the language of the easement is clear, i.e. it is not susceptible to Plaintiff's interpretation or that Defendant's interpretation is the sole interpretation based on the clear language of the easement. Triable issues of fact exists as to the scope of the easement. See disputed facts. Plaintiff's objections to Peterson declaration sustained. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NIMER MASSIS VS. JEREMY BRIGGS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Prayer In Pliantiffs First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 18, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTs JEREMY BIGGS, and ANGELA BIGGS' Motion To Strike Portions Of The Prayer In Pliantiffs First Amended Complaint GRANTED as requested. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: A-1 PROPERTY MANAGEMENT & INVESTMENTS VS. RAPHAEL M. GOINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 18, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF A-1 PROPERTY MANAGEMENT & INVESTMENTS' MOTION TO TAX COSTS GRANTED, costs are taxed in the amount of $785. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that waived costs may be recovered from Plaintiff. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: A-1 PROPERTY MANAGEMENT & INVESTMENTS VS. RAPHAEL M. GOINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Raphael M. Goins' Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Stipulation (Code Of Civ. Proc. 1717)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 18, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT RAPHAEL GOINS' Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Stipulation (Code Of Civ. Proc. 1717) GRANTED. Attorney's fees are granted in the amount of $30,400 representing reasonable hours of 86 for Ms. Denmark and 15 Ms. Gold at their respective reasonable rates of $275/hour and $450/hour. Costs are granted in the amount of $2,455.67. (See Motion tO Tax Costs). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES BEVELACQUA VS. MAGGIE KAO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Specially Appearing Defendant Maggie Kao'S Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 18, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT MAGGIE KAO'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint OFF CALENDAR, motion improperly set per CCP 1167.4. = (501/REQ)
